stories.title: Jacob Misiorowski Sets Statcast Era Record — 57 Pitches at 100+ MPH (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Jacob Misiorowski threw 57 pitches at 100+ mph on Monday.

The previous record was 47. Set by Hunter Greene in 2022.

He's 24 years old and has 100 strikeouts in 11 starts.

When asked about it, he shrugged it off. ⚾ #Brewers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Misiorowski on Monday:

⚡ 96 total pitches
⚡ 57 at 100+ mph (Statcast era record)
⚡ 40 at 101+ mph
⚡ 9 at 103+ mph
⚡ 12 strikeouts

The Brewers have something special on their hands. ⚾ #Brewers #MLB

article.headline: Jacob Misiorowski Sets Statcast Era Record: 57 Pitches at 100+ MPH Against the Cardinals

stories.title: Nationals Sweep Guardians — 10-2 and 6-3 in Cleveland (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Washington Nationals scored 10 runs on Monday.

Then they scored 6 more on Tuesday.

Both against the AL Central leaders in Cleveland.

The Guardians just got swept at home. ⚾ #Nationals #Guardians #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Nationals 10, Guardians 2.
Nationals 6, Guardians 3.

Washington hit six home runs in the opener.

Nobody expected it. That's why we watch baseball. ⚾ #Nationals #MLB

article.headline: 16 Runs in Two Days: Nationals Take Two From Cleveland's AL Central Leaders

stories.title: Corbin Carroll — One Triple From D-Backs Franchise Record (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Corbin Carroll has 51 career triples at age 25.

The D-backs franchise record is 52. Set by Stephen Drew.

Drew needed 773 games to reach it. Carroll needed 537.

He's at Oracle Park this week. Record watch is on. ⚾ #Dbacks #MLB

article.headline: Corbin Carroll Is One Triple From D-Backs Franchise History — and He's Playing in San Francisco This Week

stories.title: Blake Snell Surgery Update — Dodgers Expect Return This Season (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Blake Snell's elbow surgery went "as expected," per Dodgers GM Brandon Gomes.

Three bone spurs removed. Team expects him back this season.

Best case: 12 days (like Skubal). Longer case: 3 months (like Díaz).

Dodgers acquired Eric Lauer in the meantime. ⚾ #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: Murakami's Historic White Sox Season — 18 HRs, Leading AL (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami is the FIRST player in MLB history to hit 10 home runs and draw 20 walks in his first 25 career games.

He's now at 18 HRs and 41 walks in 53 games.

The White Sox have a generational talent. ⚾ #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Murakami's Historic Start: 18 HRs, 41 Walks, and a Record No One Has Ever Set in MLB
